items.title: Lansing Council Pauses Data Centers 182 Days After Developer Backs Out
items.dek: The 7-1 vote blocks new proposals through January 2027 while officials write rules on water use, noise and emissions that residents say could bring jobs or protect resources.
items.judge_note: New municipal action: Lansing Council voted for a moratorium with specific timeline and scope—distinct from Warren, Pere Marquette, and Wixom actions already li
